creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Specifically:

/usr/bin/ld: /usr/lib/libxml2.so.6: invalid DSO for symbol `xmlNewDoc' definition
/usr/lib/libxml2.so.6: could not read symbols: Bad value
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)

This translates to "-lxml2 required"
